## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #12). -->

## Type

- [ ] New standard / doc
- [ ] Fix / correction
- [ ] Installer (`bin/cli.js`)
- [ ] Chore / docs / meta

## Checklist

- [ ] Standards have `load_when` front-matter and imperative MUST/SHOULD rules
- [ ] Any recommended library is permissive OSS (MIT/Apache-2.0/BSD/ISC/PostgreSQL)
- [ ] Installer changes tested (`node bin/cli.js --all`, `--help`)
- [ ] No package version bump (releases are maintainer-managed)
- [ ] Conventional Commit title
